meta.title: The Bacillus subtilis dnaI gene is part of the dnaB operon -- Bruand and Ehrlich 141 (5): 1199 -- Microbiology

abstractHtml: The dnaI gene of Bacillus subtilis, previously identified through the isolation of the dnaI2 mutant, was found to be the second gene of the dnaB operon. The nucleotide substitution in the dnaI2 mutant gene was determined.
